items.title: Improve app_connectivity
items.rationale: 86% of users experienced issues with app connectivity, which is the most frequently mentioned topic.

items.title: Enhance setup process
items.rationale: 82% of users had negative experiences with the setup process, indicating a significant pain point.

items.title: Address battery life concerns
items.rationale: 6% of users mentioned battery life as a negative aspect, which may be a deal-breaker for some customers.

items.title: Improve customer service
items.rationale: 36% of users had negative experiences with customer service, indicating a need for improvement.

items.title: Investigate accuracy issues
items.rationale: 53% of users mentioned accuracy as a negative aspect, which may be a critical feature for some customers.
